result.text:
Be like @Consensys.

– Raise $725M at the 2021–22 peak.

– Build MetaMask + Linea.

– Launch Linea TGE, extract hard, send token to zero.

– First-mover advantage in MetaMask → but kill UX. Anyone who tries Rabby never comes back (fact).

– Farm users 3+ years with insane fees, tease MASK airdrop, then introduce “points”. Reward with LINEA token (it’s going to zero anyway).

– Extract $184M fees, hire JPMorgan + Goldman, and use those numbers to pitch a “fair” $7B IPO valuation.

Max extract from crypto → max extract from TradFi.

Retire🫡
